title: eryngium bungei
intro: Eryngium bungei, also known as the Bunge's sea holly, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae) and is native to China and Central Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Eryngium bungei is prepared in herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
